rulings.Case Title: LYNN R. BARANCO et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint For Indemnification And Contribution Against Dap Inc.
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, June 15, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. DEFENDANT TRUITT & WHITE LUMBER CO., INC.'s Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint For Indemnification And Contribution Against Dap Inc. is granted. No opposition was filed. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: NORMAN LONGSTREET et al VS. AMCORD, INC. ( DBA RIVERSIDE CEMENT COMPANY) et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, June 15, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. DEFENDANT PACIFIC COAST BUILDING PRODUCTS, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is off calendar at the request of the moving party. = (220/HEK)
